nasb.text: When his servants told David these words, it pleased David to become the king’s son-in-law. Before the days had expired

esv.text: And when his servants told David these words, it pleased David well to be the king’s son-in-law. Before the time had expired,

cnv.text: 掃羅的臣僕把這些話告訴了大衛，大衛就樂意作王的女婿。在日期未滿之時，

ccb.text: 臣仆把这番话告诉了大卫，大卫欣然答应做王的女婿。期限到来之前，
